title: Ubiquiti UF-Terminal-Box, UFiber outdoor terminal box
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / Connecting cable boxes
description: The durable outdoor junction box can be installed on a wall or mast and protects UFiber devices (UF-Nano, UF-Loco and UF-AE) from adverse weather conditions, so they can remain functional in all conditions. This rugged enclosure has a screw lock design and comes with a 35 to 60mm mast mounting kit, so you can place it wherever you need IPX5 protection in your UFiber deployment UF-Nano UF-Loco UF-AE Outdoor box Reduction to a pole or wall Metal ring Screws Plastic tie
